    SELECT 
        d_week_seq,
        d_day_name,
        SUM(ext_sales_price) AS total_sales,
        d_year

        SELECT

            ws_ext_sales_price AS ext_sales_price,
            d_week_seq,
            d_day_name,
            d_year
